title: Merch Official Post your Evangelion collection
display_title: Merch Official Post your Evangelion collection
wikitext:
[]: [Merch] Official "Post your Evangelion collection"             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Aug 23, 2010 2:08 pm The Gainax Cash Cow thread is more suited for recent purchases instead of collection-posting so....yeah. I'll start us off. Updated 2012 Collection, aka the bare minimum for me: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by AngelNo13Bardiel » Mon Aug 23, 2010 2:39 pm I'll just be lazy and repeat what I put in the GCC thread... From top to bottom, left to right: Evangelion Unit-01 figure (Kaiyodo/Xebec) Evangelion Mass-Production Unit figure (Kaiyodo) Evangelion Unit-02 figure (Kaiyodo) Asuka / Rei lapel pins Rei poster Neon Genesis Evangelion: Platinum Collection DVDs Neon Genesis Evangelion: Death & Rebirth DVD Neon Genesis Evangelion: The End of Evangelion DVD Evangelion 1.01: You Are (not) Alone DVD Evangelion 1.11: You Are (not) Alone DVD Evangelion 1.11: You Are (not) Alone Blu-Ray There was also a black t-shirt with the NGE logo and three Units (00, 01, 02) on it, but it was in the wash at the time of this pic. Oh, that stack of papers? Technically not mine, but in my possession nonetheless. Make your own judgment on that one...

[]:             Quote Post by darthikari » Mon Aug 23, 2010 6:08 pm I'll start with my food promos, I know it's a repost, but it's hard to put them all together. [URL=http://img15.imageshack.us/i/dsc02871re.jpg/] [/URL] I'll try to post more in a few days, trust me I've got a lot, I've been at this for over ten years!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Aug 23, 2010 8:47 pm Wow, that's a lot of food-related merchandise. :kaos_dizzy: I'm curious: since you've been collecting for ten years, do you happen to have any food promos related to NGE instead of just the new films? And reposts are fine, the point of this thread is to show off your collection old and new afterall.

[]: Re: Official "Post your Evangelion collection" thr             Quote Post by The-Happy-Go-Lucky-Wacko » Mon Aug 23, 2010 10:05 pm @ Sailor Star Dust: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jxVC_vKXGt8&feature=related 0:00 to 0:04 is my reaction.

[]: Re: Official "Post your Evangelion collection" thr             Quote Post by Hawq » Tue Aug 24, 2010 7:45 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: My current Eva collection (aka the number one reason why SSD will never get laid!)

[]:             Quote Post by AngelNo13Bardiel » Tue Aug 24, 2010 9:39 am Here's the shirt I forgot in the other picture. Basic, but the only one I found offline. Sailor Star Dust wrote: My current Eva collection (aka the number one reason why SSD will never get laid!)

[]:             Quote Post by SpearofLonginus » Tue Aug 24, 2010 7:04 pm Edited my post over at the Cash Cow thread and reposting here: My prop Lance, Paper Knife of Longinus, Ear Pick of Longinus, among other little lance related items and my wallscroll aren't in this one, but it shows all of the Reis and Unit 00s I have (except my Tsukuda Hobby one... its so big I couldnt bring it my first trip to my new apartment lol) Also, going to post my gf's Asuka shelf tonight. I'm not sure what shes missing aside her really old Unit 02 kaiyodo figure, but she says she has more than whats there lol I have a small collection of Misato as well.. shes actually my favorite character, not Rei LOL Thanks for this thread, Sailor Star Dust Angelno13Bardiel, I've always wanted that MP Eva XD Never could find one though.

[]:             Quote Post by AngelNo13Bardiel » Tue Aug 24, 2010 8:42 pm SpearofLonginus wrote: Angelno13Bardiel, I've always wanted that MP Eva XD Never could find one though.

[]:             Quote Post by darthikari » Thu Aug 26, 2010 8:40 am SSD wrote: do you happen to have any food promos related to NGE instead of just the new films?

[]:             Quote Post by duexmachina » Fri Aug 27, 2010 8:08 pm SSD, looks great! Darthikari, that is one very impressive collection. You said you've been collecting for ten years?how much ca$h would you say you have invested in your collection?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Aug 27, 2010 9:47 pm AngelNo13Bardiel wrote: Evangelion 1.01: You Are (not) Alone DVD Evangelion 1.11: You Are (not) Alone DVD Evangelion 1.11: You Are (not) Alone Blu-Ray

[]:             Quote Post by AngelNo13Bardiel » Fri Aug 27, 2010 10:04 pm Eh, I'm impulsive. Got 1.01 for Christmas, then bought both versions of 1.11 from Amazon (mainly because it came out to be the same price as the Blu-Ray version at Best Buy).

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Aug 27, 2010 11:07 pm All I have is the Platinum Perfect Collection, Eva 1.01, Vol. 1 of the manga adaption, and Angelic Days Vol. 1 - 6.

[]:             Quote Post by darthikari » Sat Aug 28, 2010 12:28 am I'd have to say that I've spent several thousand dollars. Heck, between my set of RAHs, and Aoshima entryplugs, that's close to a grand. It's a sickness I know.... Btw more pictures are on their way.

[]:             Quote Post by RMZX » Sat Aug 28, 2010 3:07 am I'll be posting images soon. But here is what you can expect: Platinum Thinpak, Both DVD versions of 1.0, and End of Evangelion. Also, a mostly complete collection of Tamashii Spec Evangelions (Missing two renditions of Eva-01.)

[]:             Quote Post by darthikari » Tue Aug 31, 2010 1:24 pm Hi again, Heres my collection of Aoshima entry plugs.... [img][URL=http://img529.imageshack.us/i/dsc03147q.jpg/] [/URL] [URL=http://img411.imageshack.us/i/dsc03148r.jpg/] [/URL] [URL=http://img844.imageshack.us/i/dsc03150j.jpg/] [/URL] [URL=http://img840.imageshack.us/i/dsc03151v.jpg/] [/URL] [URL=http://img267.imageshack.us/i/dsc03153u.jpg/] [/URL] [/img] Yes, those are full size revoltechs next to them, they're that frickin' big. That little box to the right is a hanafuda set (a sort of card game that I don't understand how to play yet) ...these are the Lawson's exclusive pen set.... [img][URL=http://img820.imageshack.us/i/dsc03155s.jpg/] [/URL] [/img] ...and here are a couple of my shirts and my pride and joy EVA-01 hoodie... [img][URL=http://img820.imageshack.us/i/dsc03158w.jpg/] [/URL] [URL=http://img641.imageshack.us/i/dsc03156f.jpg/] [/URL] [URL=http://img641.imageshack.us/i/dsc03157k.jpg/] [/URL] [/img]

[]:             Quote Post by bladerj » Sat Sep 04, 2010 12:08 am Where did you got the pen set ? is it available online ? i wish i had a oficial eva t-shirt, but i think all official merchandise suck, its like they just trow it toguether for quick cash, as a designer i can't allow that, i make better ones from oficial artwork .

[]: So very, very dirty...             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Sat Sep 04, 2010 9:49 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Shikinami in her bloomers

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Sat Sep 04, 2010 10:15 am What I have is only a few: The Platinum Thinpack NGE, Rebuild 1.11 DVD/Blu-ray (I will not bother buying 1.01) and Der Mond. Of course, I have more books and music of the show, Death/EoE movie and Rebuild music... in my hard drive.
